phase: Phases 1-3 Complete — Phase 4 (Hub Economy & Equipment) Next

phase_completion.phase_1_run_loop: 100% (Full run loop: hub, floor sequencer, exit entity, death/victory screens, meta save, biome generation)
phase_completion.phase_2_combat: 100% (All sub-phases: enemy variety, biome config, encounter templates, loot tables, status effects, boss entity, boss arena)
phase_completion.phase_3_npcs: 100% (NPC entity, dialogue panel, dialogue engine, quest flags, 5 minor NPCs, 7-tier spawn system, room tagging, met persistence, interaction indicator)
phase_completion.phase_4_hub_economy: 0% (equipment stat wiring, shop, upgrade station, loot refinement)
phase_completion.phase_6_ng_plus: 0% (full meta save, NG+ dialogue, lore system)

roadmap_current_focus: DONE: Full run loop (StartRun, startFloor, advanceFloor, endRunDeath, endRunVictory)
DONE: Death + Victory screens with run stats
DONE: Meta save (Remnants, RunCount, BestFloor, TotalKills)
DONE: Biome-aware floor generation (4 biomes, FloorContext, difficulty scaling)
DONE: Enemy variety (7 behaviors: Roaming, Ambush, Patrol, Ranged, Swarm, Caster, Boss)
DONE: Encounter template system (8 templates, budget-based, room-tag-aware)
DONE: Biome-aware loot tables with floor scaling
DONE: Status effects (Poison, Burn, Slow, Shield, Weaken, Haste)
DONE: Boss entity with multi-phase combat (Dungeon Guardian)
DONE: Boss arena with sealed room mechanics
DONE: Full death reset (items, equipment, stats, gold)
DONE: NPC entity system with idle behavior and bob animation
DONE: Dialogue panel with typewriter text, portrait, clickable responses
DONE: Dialogue engine with condition evaluation and action execution
DONE: Quest flag store (RunState.QuestFlags + NPCMetaState in MetaSave)
DONE: 5 minor NPCs with simple dialogue (Hollow Monk, Scavenger, Forgotten Soldier, Mad Scholar, Weeping Shade)
DONE: 7-tier NPC spawn system (quest, ambient, wandering, hidden, entrance, exit, boss_adjacent)
DONE: Room tagging system (spawn, exit, boss_arena, sanctuary, treasure, guard_post, etc.)
DONE: NPC met persistence (auto-save Met flag on first dialogue)
DONE: '[E] Talk' interaction indicator centered in isometric view
NEXT: Phase 4 — Hub Economy & Equipment (shop, upgrades, equipment effects, gold economy)

fixed_bugs.title: Monsters visible through walls on previously-seen tiles
Boss could spawn inside a wall
Player items persisted after run death/victory
Monster AI followed breadcrumbs to player's old position
Exit always reachable without opening doors
NPC Met flag not persisted across sessions
DialoguePanel not resized on window resize
[E] Talk hint offset from NPC in isometric view

feature_checklist.dialogue_system: Done (panel, typewriter, conditions, actions, JSON loading)

backlog.title: A* heap upgrade
backlog.trigger: When monster count or map size causes frame drops

team_notes: Single developer. Phases 1-3 complete. Next: Phase 4 (Hub Economy & Equipment) — equipment stat wiring, shop, upgrade station, loot refinement. Roadmap expanded to 9 phases with detailed task breakdown.
next_session_focus: Phase 4 kickoff: equipment stat effects (items apply StatModifiers via RecalculateStats)
Gold economy during runs (monster drops, HUD display)
Hub Shop NPC + UI (buy starter items with Remnants)
Upgrade Station NPC + UI (permanent upgrades with Remnants)
